positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest scene. Dominant elements include towering, bioluminescent trees with crystalline foliage, interwoven with flowing nebula patterns that cast ethereal, complementary light. The composition features a central, illuminated portal or archway surrounded by stylized flora and fauna silhouettes (e.g., fantastical birds, glowing moths). Use a vibrant yet sophisticated color palette of deep sapphire blues, iridescent teal, glowing lavender, and accents of bright gold and lime green. Style should be high-detail vaporwave gothic, optimized for DTG printing, with strong contrast and clear edges, suitable for placement on a chest print. Minimal shading, maximal silhouette definition. Clean, vector-like aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, signature, logo, grainy, excessive shading, messy, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, amateur sketch, photorealism, gradient bleed
